blocker: Real Stratus not executed: its driver + SREGym's 5 MCP servers are external/not vendored, no MCP/HTTP transport server wraps the adapter, and no Stratus LLM key is wired. Adapter exposes our sim as SREGym's 5 tool families and is proven with a stub agent (58/61 scenarios run + resolve); real reverse-comparison numbers deferred, not fabricated.
one_line: Built + tested a SREGym-shaped adapter exposing our CIDG sim through Stratus's 5 MCP tool families (Prometheus/Loki/Jaeger/kubectl/Submission) with a kubectl->25-verb translator; proved the external-agent loop with a stub (10/10 tests, 58/61 scenarios resolve), wrote the Stratus design brief + agents.yaml + run plan; Stratus itself not run (external source/transport/key blocker).
